creator: freebsd@pe82.de
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #8)

I'm confused, but I just assume you saw the same issues I did and didn't read my comment. I think the sanitiser implies pthreads to be linke, so NO_SANITIZERS fails to link due to the missing library. I'm trying to patch the Makefile right now to get this to build as expected.
